## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Nicolas Castellanos to GrowthX Labs, discussing company strategy and vision.](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs evolved from workshops to a scalable AI-powered service, focusing on strategy, process architecture, and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Core principles: 1) Ride the model wave for continuous improvement 2) Each workflow/output should make subsequent ones easier/better/faster](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Building towards a "GitHub for knowledge work" with reproducible, AI-ready processes and expert collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Surge AI partnership ($60k/mo) validates GrowthX's expertise in managing large-scale expert networks](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

## Topics

### Company Evolution

  - [Started with AI workshops, realized workflows alone didn't drive results](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Pivoted to agency model, quickly reached \~$2M run rate with 12 customers](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Marcel quit CMO role at DeepGram to focus on GrowthX full-time](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Partnered with Daniel (ex-IFTTT) for complementary skills and scale experience](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Bootstrapped until March 2023, engineering team formed in April/May](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

### Core Technology & Approach

  - [Coding agents over drag-and-drop: More flexible, scales better with new AI models](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Three-layer system: 1) Human expertise for inputs/strategy 2) Process architects 3) Orchestration layer](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Focus on reusable, extensible components (e.g., scraping, research breakdown)](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Learning engine improves workflows, human performance, and output quality over time](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

### Market Strategy

  - [Targeting high-budget market with significant needs](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Balancing service challenges (client expectations, company readiness) with tech development](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Thoughtful about not overbuilding or getting ahead of immediate needs](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)

### Future Vision

  - [Building primitives for expert management (finding, assessing, assigning, evaluating)](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Creating "GitHub repos for knowledge work" - AI-ready, reproducible processes](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Aiming to be the core IP for companies, beyond traditional code bases](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

### Surge AI Partnership

  - [$60k/month engagement, validating GrowthX's expertise](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [Surge AI manages 100k+ experts, $1B revenue, powers high-quality AI training data](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Provides insights into scaling expert networks and quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue refining and documenting company processes and journey](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Gather feedback on onboarding materials and knowledge sequencing](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Nicolas to dive deeper into SEO aspects (mentioned looking at SEMrush)](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Explore potential applications of GrowthX's core technology in other use cases](https://fathom.video/share/7pmoytqnCF_tWjud8jzpHQ9zRX5Pqxxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
